trait.fallen_traits.rage.desc: Landing consecutive hits on the same target increases damage dealt. Stacks reset if the target hits back.
item.fallen_traits.rage_glove.desc: Melee attacks deal %s more damage per consecutive hit, up to %s total. Resets on being hit or after 10s of inactivity.
trait.fallen_traits.mimic.desc: Mob will wear the same equipment as the nearest player within %s blocks instead of randomly generated gear.
trait.fallen_traits.clone.desc: While engaged in combat, periodically creates illusion clones of itself. Clones die in one hit and explode when killed.
trait.fallen_traits.cleanse.desc: Periodically purges its own harmful effects and inflicts them on its current target instead.
